title: Multiversion Concurrency Control (MVCC) Timeline
description: A timeline showing how MVCC uses multiple versions of data items to provide consistent snapshots for concurrent transactions, allowing readers to access older versions without blocking writers.
relationships: T1 reads Version 1 of X from its snapshot
T2 writes, creating Version 2 of X
T3 reads Version 1 of X from its snapshot, unaffected by T2's uncommitted write
